proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide (=1) and those not receiving it (=0).
Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_abiraterone (=1) and those not receiving it (=0).
Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_docetaxel (=1) and those not receiving it (=0).
Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_olaparib (=1) and those not receiving it (=0).
Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma (=1) and those not receiving it (=0).
Mean pfs_months differs between patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab (=1) and those not receiving it (=0).

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS 3.728 on treatment_enzalutamide=1 (n=20076) vs 3.755 off (n=29924); Welch t-test p=0.153.
Mean PFS 3.740 on treatment_abiraterone=1 (n=14991) vs 3.746 off (n=35009); Welch t-test p=0.776.
Mean PFS 3.732 on treatment_docetaxel=1 (n=15187) vs 3.749 off (n=34813); Welch t-test p=0.381.
Mean PFS 3.829 on treatment_olaparib=1 (n=5098) vs 3.735 off (n=44902); Welch t-test p=0.00329.
Mean PFS 3.741 on treatment_lu177_psma=1 (n=7504) vs 3.745 off (n=42496); Welch t-test p=0.872.
Mean PFS 3.805 on treatment_pembrolizumab=1 (n=2384) vs 3.741 off (n=47616); Welch t-test p=0.137.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a univariate OLS, older age (age_years) is associated with longer pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, higher ECOG PS (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, higher PSA (psa_ng_ml) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, higher Gleason score (gleason_score) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, higher serum albumin (albumin_g_dl) is associated with longer pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, higher LDH (ldh_u_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, higher hemoglobin (hemoglobin_g_dl) is associated with longer pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, higher alkaline phosphatase (alkaline_phosphatase_u_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, more 6-month weight loss (weight_loss_pct_6mo) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, higher CRP (crp_mg_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
In a univariate OLS, higher neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS β=0.1740 for age_years, p=0, R²=0.7319.
OLS β=-1.1606 for ecog_ps, p=0, R²=0.1509.
OLS β=-0.0062 for gleason_score, p=0.486, R²=0.0000.
OLS β=0.4949 for albumin_g_dl, p=1.47e-166, R²=0.0150.
OLS β=-0.0115 for hemoglobin_g_dl, p=0.0225, R²=0.0001.
OLS β=-0.0005 for alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, p=0.00663, R²=0.0001.
OLS β=-0.0749 for weight_loss_pct_6mo, p=9.91e-226, R²=0.0204.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Castration-resistant disease (mcrpc=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than its absence.
Visceral metastases (visceral_mets=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than its absence.
Liver metastases (liver_mets=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than its absence.
Bone metastases (bone_mets=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than its absence.
Adrenal metastases (adrenal_mets=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than its absence.
Pleural effusion present is associated with shorter pfs_months than its absence.
Pericardial effusion present is associated with shorter pfs_months than its absence.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS 3.706 (visceral_mets=1, n=9973) vs 3.754 (visceral_mets=0, n=40027); p=0.0345.
Mean PFS 3.743 (liver_mets=1, n=7392) vs 3.744 (liver_mets=0, n=42608); p=0.948.
Mean PFS 3.753 (bone_mets=1, n=10056) vs 3.742 (bone_mets=0, n=39944); p=0.624.
Mean PFS 3.782 (adrenal_mets=1, n=4994) vs 3.740 (adrenal_mets=0, n=45006); p=0.166.
Mean PFS 3.707 (pleural_effusion=1, n=7541) vs 3.751 (pleural_effusion=0, n=42459); p=0.0871.
Mean PFS 3.710 (pericardial_effusion=1, n=2011) vs 3.746 (pericardial_effusion=0, n=47989); p=0.426.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive brca2_mutation × treatment_olaparib interaction on pfs_months: BRCA2-mutated patients receiving olaparib (a PARP inhibitor) have longer pfs_months than BRCA2-mutated patients not on olaparib, with a larger benefit than in BRCA2-wild-type.

There is a positive ar_v7_positive × treatment_enzalutamide interaction on pfs_months: AR-V7-positive patients have a smaller (or negative) PFS benefit from enzalutamide than AR-V7-negative patients (AR-V7 is a known marker of resistance to AR-targeted therapy).
There is a positive ar_v7_positive × treatment_abiraterone interaction on pfs_months: AR-V7-positive patients have a smaller (or negative) PFS benefit from abiraterone than AR-V7-negative patients.

There is a positive msi_high × treatment_pembrolizumab interaction on pfs_months: MSI-high patients receiving pembrolizumab have longer pfs_months than MSI-high patients not on pembrolizumab, with a larger benefit than in microsatellite-stable patients.

There is a positive psma_high × treatment_lu177_psma interaction on pfs_months: PSMA-high patients receiving Lu-177-PSMA radioligand therapy have longer pfs_months than PSMA-high patients not on Lu-177-PSMA, with a larger benefit than in PSMA-low patients.

analyses.result_summary: Treatment effect within brca2_mutation=1: 1.545 mo (n=4996); within brca2_mutation=0: -0.073 mo (n=45004); interaction coefficient β=1.6188, p=4.33e-61.
Treatment effect within ar_v7_positive=1: -0.024 mo (n=10038); within ar_v7_positive=0: -0.027 mo (n=39962); interaction coefficient β=0.0025, p=0.957.
Treatment effect within ar_v7_positive=1: 0.032 mo (n=10038); within ar_v7_positive=0: -0.015 mo (n=39962); interaction coefficient β=0.0476, p=0.334.
Treatment effect within msi_high=1: -0.265 mo (n=1528); within msi_high=0: 0.075 mo (n=48472); interaction coefficient β=-0.3401, p=0.153.
Treatment effect within psma_high=1: -0.011 mo (n=29962); within psma_high=0: 0.006 mo (n=20038); interaction coefficient β=-0.0174, p=0.737.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The PFS effect of treatment_enzalutamide differs between mCRPC (mcrpc=1) and hormone-sensitive (mcrpc=0) patients (mcrpc × treatment_enzalutamide interaction).
The PFS effect of treatment_abiraterone differs between mCRPC (mcrpc=1) and hormone-sensitive (mcrpc=0) patients (mcrpc × treatment_abiraterone interaction).
The PFS effect of treatment_docetaxel differs between mCRPC (mcrpc=1) and hormone-sensitive (mcrpc=0) patients (mcrpc × treatment_docetaxel interaction).
The PFS effect of treatment_olaparib differs between mCRPC (mcrpc=1) and hormone-sensitive (mcrpc=0) patients (mcrpc × treatment_olaparib interaction).
The PFS effect of treatment_lu177_psma differs between mCRPC (mcrpc=1) and hormone-sensitive (mcrpc=0) patients (mcrpc × treatment_lu177_psma interaction).
The PFS effect of treatment_pembrolizumab differs between mCRPC (mcrpc=1) and hormone-sensitive (mcrpc=0) patients (mcrpc × treatment_pembrolizumab interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Treatment effect in mcrpc=1: -0.048 mo; in mcrpc=0: 0.001 mo; interaction p=0.18.
Treatment effect in mcrpc=1: 0.005 mo; in mcrpc=0: -0.024 mo; interaction p=0.449.

Treatment effect in mcrpc=1: 0.043 mo; in mcrpc=0: 0.090 mo; interaction p=0.581.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age, ECOG, mCRPC, visceral_mets, PSA, Gleason, albumin, LDH and hemoglobin, treatment_enzalutamide retains an independent main-effect association with pfs_months.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, mCRPC, visceral_mets, PSA, Gleason, albumin, LDH and hemoglobin, treatment_abiraterone retains an independent main-effect association with pfs_months.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, mCRPC, visceral_mets, PSA, Gleason, albumin, LDH and hemoglobin, treatment_docetaxel retains an independent main-effect association with pfs_months.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, mCRPC, visceral_mets, PSA, Gleason, albumin, LDH and hemoglobin, treatment_olaparib retains an independent main-effect association with pfs_months.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, mCRPC, visceral_mets, PSA, Gleason, albumin, LDH and hemoglobin, treatment_lu177_psma retains an independent main-effect association with pfs_months.
After adjusting for age, ECOG, mCRPC, visceral_mets, PSA, Gleason, albumin, LDH and hemoglobin, treatment_pembrolizumab retains an independent main-effect association with pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_enzalutamide + age_years + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + psa_ng_ml + gleason_score + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + hemoglobin_g_dl', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted β for treatment_enzalutamide = -0.0063, p=0.209, model R²=0.9253.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative ecog_ps × treatment_docetaxel interaction on pfs_months: the PFS benefit of treatment_docetaxel is smaller (or harm larger) in patients with worse performance status (higher ecog_ps).

There is a negative ecog_ps × treatment_enzalutamide interaction on pfs_months: the PFS benefit of treatment_enzalutamide is smaller (or harm larger) in patients with worse performance status (higher ecog_ps).

There is a negative ecog_ps × treatment_abiraterone interaction on pfs_months: the PFS benefit of treatment_abiraterone is smaller (or harm larger) in patients with worse performance status (higher ecog_ps).

There is a negative ecog_ps × treatment_olaparib interaction on pfs_months: the PFS benefit of treatment_olaparib is smaller (or harm larger) in patients with worse performance status (higher ecog_ps).

There is a negative ecog_ps × treatment_lu177_psma interaction on pfs_months: the PFS benefit of treatment_lu177_psma is smaller (or harm larger) in patients with worse performance status (higher ecog_ps).

There is a negative ecog_ps × treatment_pembrolizumab interaction on pfs_months: the PFS benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab is smaller (or harm larger) in patients with worse performance status (higher ecog_ps).

There is a visceral_mets × treatment_enzalutamide interaction on pfs_months: the PFS effect of treatment_enzalutamide differs between visceral_mets=1 vs 0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: More prior lines of therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months (heavily pretreated patients have lower benefit).
Prior chemotherapy (=prior_chemotherapy=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than no prior such therapy.
Prior radiation (=prior_radiation=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than no prior such therapy.
Prior surgery (=prior_surgery=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than no prior such therapy.
Prior immunotherapy (=prior_immunotherapy=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than no prior such therapy.
Prior targeted therapy (=prior_targeted_therapy=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than no prior such therapy.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one of the 25 SNP genotype scores has a univariate association with pfs_months at the nominal α=0.05 level (with the expected ~5% false-positive rate under the null).
snp_rs4986893 (the top-ranked SNP) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.code: for s in snps: smf.ols(f'pfs_months ~ {s}', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: 1/25 SNPs showed nominal p<0.05 (consistent with chance); top 5 by p-value: snp_rs4986893 β=-0.0921 p=0.0145, snp_rs429358 β=0.0468 p=0.0639, snp_rs1065852 β=-0.0475 p=0.0892, snp_rs1799983 β=-0.0296 p=0.118, snp_rs1800896 β=-0.0254 p=0.224. None survives Bonferroni (0.05/25=0.002).
OLS β=-0.0921 p=0.0145; nominally significant but does not survive Bonferroni correction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among BRCA2-mutated patients (brca2_mutation=1), olaparib (treatment_olaparib=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no olaparib.
Among BRCA2-wild-type patients (brca2_mutation=0), olaparib has no clinically meaningful effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: olaparib effect | brca2_mutation=1: mean PFS on olaparib 5.216 (n=529) vs off 3.671 (n=4467); diff 1.545 mo, p=3.95e-27.
olaparib effect | brca2_mutation=0: mean PFS on olaparib 3.668 (n=4569) vs off 3.742 (n=40435); diff -0.073 mo, p=0.0191.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among AR-V7=positive patients, treatment_enzalutamide is associated with no PFS benefit (or harm).
Among AR-V7=negative patients, treatment_enzalutamide is associated with no PFS benefit.
Among AR-V7=positive patients, treatment_abiraterone is associated with no PFS benefit (or harm).
Among AR-V7=negative patients, treatment_abiraterone is associated with no PFS benefit.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_enzalutamide effect | ar_v7=1: mean on tx 3.719 (n=4019), off 3.744 (n=6019); diff -0.024, p=0.557.
treatment_enzalutamide effect | ar_v7=0: mean on tx 3.731 (n=16057), off 3.757 (n=23905); diff -0.027, p=0.193.

treatment_abiraterone effect | ar_v7=0: mean on tx 3.736 (n=11968), off 3.751 (n=27994); diff -0.015, p=0.49.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among PSMA-high patients (psma_high=1), Lu-177-PSMA (treatment_lu177_psma=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no Lu-177-PSMA.
Among PSMA-low patients (psma_high=0), Lu-177-PSMA has no clinically meaningful effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: lu177 effect | psma_high=1: mean on Lu-177 3.743 (n=4486) vs off 3.754 (n=25476); diff -0.011, p=0.736.
lu177 effect | psma_high=0: mean on Lu-177 3.737 (n=3018) vs off 3.731 (n=17020); diff 0.006, p=0.874.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among MSI-high patients (msi_high=1), pembrolizumab (treatment_pembrolizumab=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
Among MSI-stable patients (msi_high=0), pembrolizumab has no clinically meaningful effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: pembro effect | msi_high=1: mean on pembro 3.527 (n=79) vs off 3.792 (n=1449); diff -0.265, p=0.239.
pembro effect | msi_high=0: mean on pembro 3.814 (n=2305) vs off 3.739 (n=46167); diff 0.075, p=0.0864.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher BMI (bmi) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher systolic BP (systolic_bp_mmhg) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher diastolic BP (diastolic_bp_mmhg) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher heart rate (heart_rate_bpm) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher SpO2 (spo2_pct) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher creatinine (creatinine_mg_dl) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher BUN (bun_mg_dl) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher sodium (sodium_meq_l) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher potassium (potassium_meq_l) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher calcium (calcium_mg_dl) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher platelets (platelets_k_ul) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher WBC (wbc_k_ul) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher ANC (anc_k_ul) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).
Higher ALC (alc_k_ul) is associated with pfs_months in univariate OLS (direction depends on the variable).

β for diastolic_bp_mmhg=0.0008, p=0.387.
β for heart_rate_bpm=0.0001, p=0.868.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Rural residence (rural_residence=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than urban residence.
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
More years of education (education_years) is associated with longer pfs_months (a healthcare-access / SES proxy).
There is an interaction between treatment_docetaxel and treatment_abiraterone on pfs_months: the combined effect is greater than the sum of either alone (or shows synergy/antagonism).
There is an interaction between treatment_enzalutamide and treatment_abiraterone on pfs_months: the combined effect is greater than the sum of either alone (or shows synergy/antagonism).
There is an interaction between treatment_docetaxel and treatment_enzalutamide on pfs_months: the combined effect is greater than the sum of either alone (or shows synergy/antagonism).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction term treatment_docetaxel:treatment_abiraterone β=-0.0219, p=0.61.
Interaction term treatment_enzalutamide:treatment_abiraterone β=0.0361, p=0.371.
Interaction term treatment_docetaxel:treatment_enzalutamide β=0.0250, p=0.534.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a full multivariable model that includes all major prognostic clinical features and the five biomarker × treatment interactions of interest, the BRCA2 × olaparib interaction remains a strong, significant predictor of pfs_months.
In the same full model, the AR-V7 × enzalutamide, AR-V7 × abiraterone, MSI × pembrolizumab and PSMA × Lu-177 interactions are NOT significant predictors of pfs_months.
In the full multivariable model, ECOG performance status, mCRPC status, age, PSA, albumin, weight loss and LDH are independent predictors of pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Full model R²=0.9519 (n=50000). brca2_mutation:treatment_olaparib β=1.4367, p=0 (highly significant).

In adjusted full model: ar_v7_positive:treatment_enzalutamide β=0.0025 p=0.804, ar_v7_positive:treatment_abiraterone β=0.0158 p=0.144, msi_high:treatment_pembrolizumab β=0.0443 p=0.396, psma_high:treatment_lu177_psma β=0.0005 p=0.962. None reaches p<0.05.

Adjusted prognostic effects: age_years β=0.1736 p=0; ecog_ps β=-1.1516 p=0; mcrpc β=-0.3760 p=0; psa_ng_ml β=-0.0027 p=0; albumin_g_dl β=0.4794 p=0; ldh_u_l β=-0.0005 p=8.82e-87; weight_loss_pct_6mo β=-0.0764 p=0. All highly significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between black race/ethnicity (vs all other groups) and treatment_enzalutamide on pfs_months: the PFS effect of treatment_enzalutamide differs in black patients.
There is an interaction between black race/ethnicity (vs all other groups) and treatment_abiraterone on pfs_months: the PFS effect of treatment_abiraterone differs in black patients.
There is an interaction between black race/ethnicity (vs all other groups) and treatment_docetaxel on pfs_months: the PFS effect of treatment_docetaxel differs in black patients.
There is an interaction between black race/ethnicity (vs all other groups) and treatment_olaparib on pfs_months: the PFS effect of treatment_olaparib differs in black patients.
There is an interaction between black race/ethnicity (vs all other groups) and treatment_lu177_psma on pfs_months: the PFS effect of treatment_lu177_psma differs in black patients.
There is an interaction between black race/ethnicity (vs all other groups) and treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months: the PFS effect of treatment_pembrolizumab differs in black patients.
Uninsured patients (insurance_type='uninsured') derive less PFS benefit from the high-cost targeted therapy treatment_olaparib than privately/publicly insured patients (interaction term).
Uninsured patients (insurance_type='uninsured') derive less PFS benefit from the high-cost targeted therapy treatment_lu177_psma than privately/publicly insured patients (interaction term).
Uninsured patients (insurance_type='uninsured') derive less PFS benefit from the high-cost targeted therapy treatment_pembrolizumab than privately/publicly insured patients (interaction term).
